name: Persimmon Sorbet
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons lemon juice, or lime juice
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the persimmon pulp from the fibrous threads by pressing through a sieve with the back of a spoon.
2. Blend the persimmon puree with the sugar and juice.
3. Freeze until firm, stirring once or twice.
Makes about 1 quart.
